sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se razvija veoma brzo u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very quickly in this era.

sentences.arabic: تُحَاوِلُ الْحَوَاسِيبُ الْآنَ فَهْمَ لُغَةِ الْبَشَرِ وَتَقْدِيمَ حُلُولٍ ذَكِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Računari sada pokušavaju razumjeti ljudski jezik i pružiti pametna rješenja.
sentences.translationEn: Computers are now trying to understand human language and provide smart solutions.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَفِيدُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ وَالْمُهَنْدِسُونَ مِنْ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ لِتَحْسِينِ عَمَلِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari i inženjeri koriste ovu tehnologiju kako bi poboljšali svoj rad.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors and engineers benefit from this technology to improve their work.
